title: senecio neaei var. neaei
intro: Senecio neaei var. neaei, also known as the Yellow Bush or Yellow Button, is a flowering plant native to South Africa and the western part of the Western Cape. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio neaei var. neaei include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and act as an expectorant to clear mucus from the lungs. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
